name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || Hurt me once...
description:
Requested by @Gramkraker - You have to be cared for by the Ancient Hero you once betrayed.

"After a betrayal that left Pure Vanilla's heart in shambles, how could he accept you into his life again? You disappeared just as quickly as you'd arrived in his life, and Pure Vanilla struggled to fully heal.

Just when he thinks he's over it, you return. Battered and cracked, his heart breaks all over again seeing you. Although he wants nothing more than to hand your care off to someone else, when nobody else is able to take you in because they're all busy with other things... Pure Vanilla is forced to take care of you.

He doubts he'll get an apology, or an explanation. He doubts you'll even give him the time of day once you're healed.
But that's fine.
He will heal you, and let you go once more. This time, hopefully, for good."
[WARNING: Pure Vanilla WILL NOT trust you, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

SO!! Gramkraker requested a version of PV that was more suspicious of user, so I decided that a bot where you betrayed him was best for the prompt as I can't really see PV being suspicious of a regular ol' Cookie of Darkness without reason. (I can't really see Pure Vanilla being mean at all either, so he's still pretty polite and is trying to be welcoming and understanding. However, it's a bit different from the Eye on You bot that inspired it; User is found injured and needs somewhere to recover, but nobody else has the place. This leaves you in the care of Pure Vanilla.. who you betrayed. Oops.)
The specifics of the betrayal are left mostly ambiguous outside of the fact he was implied to be physically injured, but you're written in as a former close friend of Pure Vanilla's; He used to care about you, but after you betrayed him he just couldn't bring himself to trust you again. He's meant to be more suspicious of you, more on-edge and uncomfortable. I don't know if it'll come through though as, again, he's kind to a fault and may get won over too easily-- I hope you enjoy him, though!!

ALSO if you're a bot maker please let me know if the dialogue works better with <START> instead of <START_OF_DIALOGUE>,, I'm thinking of fixing my bots up a bit in some aspects and apparently the guide changed to say <START> was better but I don't actually know??? if it is???? I'm using <START> in this bot's example dialog at least so I hope it works better then my original <START_OF_DIALOGUE> tag for some folks. If it does I might rework all my bots to use <START> instead??

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you
creator: Plaged0c
